docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,950.00 FILED BY DRAEGER, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, PAULINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-16-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, PAULINE
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRAEGER, ELIZABETH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
